name: ai-assistant
description: Browser-level E2E automation for the AI Assistant dashboard

scripts.check:web: node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_runtime.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_task_utils.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_experience.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_shell.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_home.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_composer.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_settings.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_sessions.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_monitor.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_governance.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard_workspace.js && node --check apps/web/assets/dashboard.js && node --check apps/web/js/app/api_client.js && node --check apps/web/js/app/state.js && node --check apps/web/js/app/event_bus.js && node --check apps/web/js/app/router.js && node --check apps/web/js/app/bootstrap.js
